confirm.title: スーパー管理者権限を付与しますか？
confirm.body: {{email}} に、ユーザー管理、破壊的操作、すべてのクライアントデータを含む、すべてへの無制限アクセスを付与しようとしています。これは彼らによって取り消せません。この人を完全に信頼する場合のみ続行してください。
confirm.confirm: はい、スーパー管理者を付与

planDialog.subtitle: Tier details, localized prices, quotas, and feature flags.
planDialog.defaultTrialTip: When a new client is created, automatically start a trial on this plan. Only one plan can be marked as default.
planDialog.pricesHelper: Leave blank for "contact us" in that currency
planDialog.historyHelper: Cap on how far back orders & customers are fetched on initial/full sync. Empty = unlimited. Suggested: Free 90, Pro 365.

translations.title: Translations
translations.subtitle: Download English JSON files, translate offline, then drop them back into public/locales/{{locale}}/.
translations.howToBody: English is the source of truth. Download a namespace, translate the values (keep keys identical), and place the file at public/locales/{locale}/{namespace}.json. Reload the app and the new locale appears in the language switcher.
translations.localesSubtitle: Key parity vs English source. Missing keys fall back to English at runtime.

paymentMethods.title: Payment Methods
paymentMethods.subtitle: Define payment gateways. The key must match the exact WooCommerce payment_method value.

dialog.description: The key must match exactly what WooCommerce sends in payment_method (e.g. myfatoorah_v2, stripe, cod).

delete.title: Delete payment method?
delete.body: Delete "{{label}}"? Orders with this method will fall back to showing the raw key.
